useKeyboardNav coverage 23→65 (was 0.56 ratio): added 42 tests. Source-level guarantees (returns {focusedNodeId, setFocusedNodeId, clearFocus}, 4 direction angles in targetAngle map, ±90° cone filter, scoring weights angle×100 + dist×0.1). Zoom shortcuts (=/+/0/f/-) with exact zoomBy factors and 200ms duration. Modifier shortcuts (Ctrl+[/], '?' overlay toggle). Tab cycling (Shift+Tab=-1 step, no-focus=first/last, modulo with positive offset). Enter context menu (getClientByCanvas with container-center fallback, nodeByIdRef O(1) lookup). Arrow direction map (4 keys × focused requirement, parent-sync via onNodeClick). + quick-add gated on focus. Escape clears focus + calls onNodeClick(null) + clears multi-selection. Keyboard hijack-prevention (INPUT/TEXTAREA/SELECT/contenteditable/[role=dialog|alertdialog] skip). applyFocusRing preserves other element states (filter !== 'selected' before append, fallback to plain ['selected'] on getElementState throw). 200ms ease-out pan to focus. clearFocus reads via focusedNodeIdRef (stable closure). External selectedNodeId sync. Auto-clear focus when node removed. container-scoped keydown listener. Result: 74 files / 2870 tests, ALL PASSING.

cumulative.milestone: PERFECT — 74/74 files pass, 2870/2870 assertions pass; useKeyboardNav full keyboard contract (~25 distinct shortcuts) pinned at the source level
